title: Instagram — Abrazo de Oso (Buenos Aires nonprofit) profile
html:
Instagram profile of abrazo de oso — a Buenos Aires (CABA) nonprofit "acompañamos a personas en situación de vulnerabilidad" (8,872 followers, 48 posts) that Yahir bookmarked, possibly while researching mission-driven orgs in Argentina.
